attempt_1_structural_questions.Q2_evidence: Single-head computation; no new inter-layer or inter-head edge

regenerated_candidate_summary: Topos-elementary-classifier coevolution (regen attempt 2; introduces Topos-elementary-classifier coevolution as new learnable module with new subobject parameters; adds new learnable classifier module inter-layer pathway)

rationale: R791 first-attempt candidate was R279-pattern (functional on existing weights; Q1=Q2=Q3=NO). Regeneration with explicit anti-R279 instruction produced architectural-topology candidate (Q1=YES new module; Q2=YES new pathway). Classifier accepts regenerated candidate.
